## Verification

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run validate`
- [ ] Citation Check workflow remains green or was not affected
- [ ] Secret Scan workflow remains green or was not affected

## Disclosure and citation safety

- [ ] No fabricated citations were introduced
- [ ] DOI examples are real or clearly non-resolving placeholders
- [ ] AI disclosure frontmatter is complete for changed booklets
- [ ] No credentials, private vault paths, clinical identifiers, participant data, or institution secrets were added

## Reviewer notes

Describe any remaining uncertainty, manual verification needs, or release blockers.
